since_last: 42% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.90%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -1.02% · Gold -0.06% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 42% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.90%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.90%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.38%
cards.body: Leaders: BIDU +3.07%, AVAV +2.68%, WDAY +2.15%, NOW +1.88%, ORCL +1.83%. Laggards: SKHY -6.38%, ARM -4.72%, TSM -3.82%, DELL -3.19%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.32% at $135.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.32% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
